title: A Vacation Recommendation
overview: In the blink of an eye, a famous young chancellor named Lizel finds himself transported to another world.

title: An Adventurer's Debut
overview: Lizel embarks on his first mission with Gil and ends up meeting a wide variety of people.

title: A Letter from Ray
overview: With help from Gil, Lizel easily completes jobs for the guild, which attracts attention from a collector.

title: Arriving in Marcade
overview: Judge cooks an extravagant meal on the road, while Lizel and Gil take turns keeping watch.

title: Equals
overview: Lizel and Gil win a valuable item at an auction.

title: Judge's Grandfather
overview: Lizel and Gil report their discovery at the labyrinth to the guild and have lunch with Judge's grandfather.

title: The Night of the Promotion
overview: Lizel is promoted from adventurer rank F to E, so he goes out with Gil, Stud, and Judge to celebrate.

title: The Midday Attack
overview: Lizel volunteers to fill in for an injured performer in a play.

title: Judge's Problem
overview: Despite being terrified by Lizel the day before, Eleven returns to ask to join his adventuring party.

title: Eleven's Request
overview: Lizel and his companions investigate the theft of labyrinth goods by a merchant's guild staff member.

title: Welcome to the Party
overview: Before welcoming Eleven into his party, Lizel must deal with the remnants of the Forky Gang.

title: A Country Without Lizel
overview: Lizel's party accept a job to help produce healing potions.
